meta.title: AI Factory — Unified AI Operations Platform | ohara.systems
meta.description: The unified control plane for enterprise AI operations. Connects Model Prism, Prompt Flux, Agent Forge, and Agent Atlas into a single, self-hosted platform.

home.description: Unified control plane that connects routing, guardrails, agents, and prompt optimization into one self-hosted platform.

overview.description: The unified control plane for enterprise AI operations — connects Model Prism, Prompt Flux, Agent Forge, and Agent Atlas into a single platform.

hero.description: AI Factory is the unified control plane that wires together all ohara products — Model Prism for routing and cost control, Prompt Flux for guardrails and prompt optimization, Agent Forge for building agents, and Agent Atlas for pre-built agent templates. One dashboard, one tenant registry, one audit log.

products.name: Model Prism
products.description: Intelligent model routing, per-tenant cost tracking, auto-routing with self-optimizing Benchmark Agent.

products.name: Prompt Flux
products.description: PII detection, prompt injection prevention, content policy enforcement, and automatic prompt improvement — via self-hosted LLMs.

products.name: Agent Forge
products.description: Framework for building, customizing, and deploying AI agents with full control over behavior and orchestration.

products.name: Agent Atlas
products.description: Curated library of production-ready AI agents — modular, composable, ready to deploy.

flow.title: How it connects
flow.description: AI Factory is the orchestration layer that wires the four products into an end-to-end pipeline.

items.title: Single Pane of Glass
items.description: One dashboard for agents, prompts, routing, costs, and guardrails. No more switching between four admin UIs.

items.title: Unified Tenant Registry
items.description: Create a tenant once in AI Factory — it propagates to Model Prism (routing), Prompt Flux (guardrails), and Agent Forge (permissions) automatically.

items.title: Cross-Product Analytics
items.description: End-to-end visibility: which agent made which request, what guardrails fired, how the router decided, what it cost — in one timeline.

items.title: Orchestration Layer
items.description: Wire products together declaratively. An agent from Atlas/Forge automatically uses Prompt Flux guardrails and Model Prism routing — zero manual plumbing.

items.title: Centralized Audit Log
items.description: Every request, guardrail hit, routing decision, and agent action in one immutable audit trail. Built for compliance teams.

items.title: Self-hosted & Air-gapped
items.description: The entire platform runs on your infrastructure. No SaaS dependency, no data leaving your network. Enterprise license with offline activation.

example.title: Example: Customer Support in 5 minutes
steps: Open AI Factory, create project "Customer Support"
Pick a pre-built agent from Agent Atlas (e.g. "Support Responder v2")
Customize it in Agent Forge — add your knowledge base, set tone, define escalation rules
Prompt Flux auto-configures: PII redaction for customer data, no medical advice guardrail
Model Prism routes: simple questions → Haiku, complex escalations → Opus
AI Factory dashboard: agent performance, costs, guardrail hits, routing quality — all in one view

cta.title: Interested in AI Factory?
cta.description: AI Factory is in early development. Start with Model Prism today — it's free, self-hosted, and the foundation of the platform.
